arts.ttl: Latest from Germany: Cesc Fabregas now in picture with Crystal Palace and Sheffield Wednesday managers for RB Leipzig
arts.sum: Cesc Fabregas has been added to RB Leipzig’s list of potential managerial appointments alongside Sheffield Wednesday’s Danny Rohl and Crystal Palace manager Oliver Glasner. That’s according to journalist Philipp Hinze, who reports that the former Premier League star, currently manager at Como, now finds himself on the list at the German side. Leipzig are on The post Latest from Germany: Cesc Fabregas now in picture with Crystal Palace and Sheffield Wednesday managers for RB Leipzig appeared first on Sport Witness.
RB Leipzig continue to chase for a place in the Champions League as they travel to Wolfsburg on Friday evening. Wolfsburg currently find themselves in 12th place with 38 points…

arts.ttl: RB Leipzig considering Cesc Fabregas, as they continue their search for a new head coach
arts.sum: Leipziger Volkszeitung reports that Cesc Fabregas is under consideration at RB Leipzig as they continue their search for Marco Rose’s replacement. Fabregas is currently the head coach of Italian side Como.…

arts.ttl: Wolfsburg injuries starting to clear up ahead of Leipzig clash
arts.sum: VfL Wolfsburg's injury crisis is beginning to ease as they prepare for Friday night's match against RB Leipzig.

arts.ttl: Fabregas also touted as candidate for Leipzig job
arts.sum: Cesc Fabregas is the latest name to be mentioned in connection with the RB Leipzig coaching job.

arts.ttl: Ezechiel Banzuzi: Who is RB Leipzig's new Dutch midfielder?
arts.sum: RB Leipzig have announced the summer arrival of Ezechiel Banzuzi move from Belgian Pro League side Leuven. Impressive performances for club and country convinced Leipzig to make Banzuzi their first signing ahead of the 2025/26 season.

arts.ttl: Preview: Wolfsburg vs. RB Leipzig - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Friday's Bundesliga clash between Wolfsburg and RB Leipzig, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
